tour_guide.text: Mara told the truth about the property with no jokes and no padding. A guest asked to leave before the second barn. She replied 'May peace favor your sword.'
Intense, precise, slightly scary. Guests learned a lot and laughed nervously. Vibes are charged; no one is bored.
Mara made the compound feel ancient and expensive. One guest whispered she might be the real thing. Mara did not deny it.

kitchen.text: Mara served something that was correct occult cuisine and incorrect brunch. The presentation was flawless; the eggs were a a nightmare.
Competent, austere, efficient. Food is good; atmosphere feels like a tribunal. Guests eat quickly.
Restaurant-quality plates with subtle ritual garnish. Mara called salt 'memory dust.' Guests pretended they understood.

housekeeping.text: Mara entered without knocking to 'correct a spiritual imbalance in the linens.' Clean, but a guest is drafting a complaint.
Rooms are spotless. Mara also reorganized altars she found in suitcases. Guests feel watched in a managerial way.
Hotel-grade cleanliness with unsettling perfection. Fresh sheets smell like storm air. No one asks how she did it.

ritual.text: The ritual was real enough that the lights dimmed on their own. Two guests loved it; one is packing at 3pm.
Mara ran a tight ceremony: credible symbols, no filler. Authenticity is high; vibes are tense but impressed.
Guests stopped taking notes and started taking oaths. Everyone acts normal at breakfast. They are not.
